EmailTemplate.name: AN - Induction invite reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: Reminder to book your Alliance Nursing Induction
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
ENTER THE WORLD OF ALLIANCE.
Hi {!Candidate.FirstName},
Your first Alliance shift is just around the corner! This is a gentle reminder to book your Alliance Nursing Induction. You can select online or to visit one of our branches for an in-person induction.
Start by selecting a day and time that suits you:
BOOK MY INDUCTION
If you come into one of our offices, you will leave with your new Alliance Nursing uniform, ID badge and your first shift!
We are looking forward to working with you!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Nursing
